Welcome to the SecureSystems Lab Website

May 7, 2026 • Pooya Rostami Mazrae

Welcome

This is the first blog post on the SecureSystems Lab website.

We are currently setting up the website infrastructure and preparing the initial research pages, publications, and project descriptions.

The website is based on the Allan Lab academic template and is being extended with additional features including:

  • Blog posts
  • Research project pages
  • Team member profiles
  • Publication management
  • Docker-based local development

Stay tuned for future updates.

© 2026 DNet GT Lab. Site made with Jekyll; copy and modify it for your own research group.

We are part of the Group T Leuven Campus.

Contact:
Andreas Vesaliusstraat 13
3000 Leuven
